name: pilotfish-agents
description: Vendored copy of Nanako0129/pilotfish's six role subagents (scout, Explore, mech-executor, executor, verifier, security-executor) plus hooks that reinforce the delegation policy each turn so it doesn't decay under a strong task prompt. Named distinctly from upstream's "pilotfish" to avoid marketplace name collisions. The settings.json fallbackModel key stays a manual step — see README.md.
